channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: US soldiers who died in Iran war remembered as devoted parents and reservists
item.description: Four of the six U.S. soldiers killed in the Iran war have been identified by the Pentagon as members of the Army Reserve.

item.title: Military families anxious about unknowns of Iran war, proud of their service members
Jasmine Crockett concedes to James Talarico in Texas Democratic Senate primary
